questions.question: Which of the following is a scalar quantity?
questions.explanation: Speed is a scalar quantity as it has only magnitude, while displacement, velocity, and acceleration are vector quantities having both magnitude and direction.
questions.subject: Physics

questions.question: The angle of projection for maximum horizontal range of a projectile is:
questions.explanation: The horizontal range R = (u² sin 2θ) / g. R is maximum when sin 2θ = 1, which means 2θ = 90° or θ = 45°.
questions.subject: Physics

questions.question: In a uniform circular motion, the acceleration is always:
questions.explanation: In uniform circular motion, centripetal acceleration acts towards the centre of the circular path.
questions.subject: Physics
